question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
प्रत्येक राज्य के लिए क्षेत्र प्रकार के आधार पर उप-जिलों की संख्या का विवरण प्रदान करें, राज्य के नाम के वर्णानुक्रम में और फिर उच्चतम गणना के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध किया गया।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, dim_sub_district.type_of_area, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_sub_district
JOIN dim_district ON dim_sub_district.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name, dim_sub_district.type_of_area
ORDER BY dim_state.state_name ASC, sub_district_count DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, dim_sub_district.type_of_area, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_sub_district
JOIN dim_district ON dim_sub_district.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name, dim_sub_district.type_of_area
ORDER BY dim_state.state_name ASC, sub_district_count DESC;

सभी उप-जिलों और उनके क्षेत्र प्रकारों को 2021 में दर्ज की गई एलोपैथिक आउटपेशेंट यात्राओं की कुल संख्या के आधार पर रैंक करें, सबसे अधिक उपस्थिति से शुरू करते हुए।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area, SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_attendance
FROM fact_outpatient_services fos
JOIN dim_sub_district ds ON fos.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON fos.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area
ORDER BY total_attendance DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area, SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_attendance
FROM fact_outpatient_services fos
JOIN dim_sub_district ds ON fos.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON fos.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area
ORDER BY total_attendance DESC;

question: असम के उन जिलों के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें जिनमें एक से अधिक ग्रामीण उप-जिले हैं, वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध।
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' AND T3.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
  AND sd.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.district_name
HAVING COUNT(sd.sub_district_id) > 1
ORDER BY d.district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
  AND sd.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.district_name
HAVING COUNT(sd.sub_district_id) > 1
ORDER BY d.district_name;

JOIN dim_month ON fact_outpatient_services.month_id = dim_month.month_id
WHERE dim_month.month_name ILIKE 'December, 2022'

  AND fact_outpatient_services.outpatient_attendance_allopathic > 0
ORDER BY fact_outpatient_services.outpatient_attendance_allopathic DESC;

question:
इस प्रश्न का अनुवाद करें:
उप-जिलों और उनके क्षेत्र प्रकारों को वर्ष 2021 में दर्ज की गई एलोपैथिक आउटपेशेंट उपस्थिति के कुल आयतन के आधार पर रैंक करें, सबसे उच्चतम से शुरू करते हुए।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area, SUM(f.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_attendance
FROM fact_outpatient_services f
JOIN dim_sub_district ds ON f.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON f.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area
ORDER BY total_attendance DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area, SUM(f.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_attendance
FROM fact_outpatient_services f
JOIN dim_sub_district ds ON f.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON f.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area
ORDER BY total_attendance DESC;
